title: gonolobus marmoreus
intro: Gonolobus marmoreus, also known as the marble flower, is a type of climbing plant in the Apocynaceae family native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gonolobus marmoreus include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
